title: Ubiquiti UAP-AC-SHD - UniFi Wave2 AC AP, Security and BLE
description: Expand your wireless network with the UAP-AC-SHD 802.11AC Wave 2 Access Point with Dedicated Security Radio from Ubiquiti. This wireless access point supports 802.11a/g/b/n/ac-wave2 Wi-Fi standards and operates on both the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz frequencies. In addition to enhanced Wi-Fi support, this AP also comes equipped with dual Gigabit Ethernet PoE compliant ports featuring 802.3at PoE+ compatibility airView - Real-time analysis of all of your available RF channels - with no performance impact or client disruption airTime - Real-time analysis of all SSIDs, stations, data types, and interference - with no performance impact or client disruption WIPS - Dedicated Wireless Intrusion Prevention System (WIPS) security radio and processor for ultimate security, protection, and network awareness Thanks to MU-MIMO (Multiple-User - Multiple-In - Multiple-Out) technology UAP AC-SHD is able to communicate with several devices at the same time : 4 clients 1x1 2 clients 2x2 1 client 2x2 + 2 clients 1x1 1 client 3x3 + 1 client 1x1 UniFi APs doesn't have own web GUI and you manage them via UniFi Controller, which you can download on Ubiquiti websites here: http://www.ubnt.com . Or you can manage UAP devices using UniFi Cloud Key which has UniFi Controller preinstalled. Additional benefit is fact that UniFi Controller software is free of costs and includes advanced functions without limitations Zero Handoff Roaming Wireless uplink Up to 8 SSID Detailed traffic stats Guest network Load balance Speed limitaions for each SSID Device Ceiling attach kit Screws PoE power adapter AC power cord
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1733 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 800 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 25 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 25 Security WEP, WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2, TKIP/AES) 802.1w/PMF 2.4GHz MIMO 4 x 4 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 6 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Other features Security radio Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at, 44 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 20 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 70 Weight [g] 700 Width [mm] 220 Height [mm] 48 Depth [mm] 220
